title: How Did This Cow Mutilation Happen?!
summary: This short clip discusses a disturbing cow mutilation incident at Skinwalker Ranch, where a healthy heifer was found dead from stress-induced pneumonia with no visible injuries or predator tracks. Surveillance footage appeared to show a UFO-shaped object appearing above the cow at the moment of its distress, accompanied by elevated radiation readings.

key_claims.claim: A perfectly healthy two-year-old heifer cow was found dead with no exterior injuries at Skinwalker Ranch
An autopsy revealed pneumonia caused by a severe stressor killed the cow
No predator tracks were found near the dead cow
High levels of radiation were detected around the cow, higher than standing in front of a microwave
Surveillance footage showed a UFO-shaped object appearing directly above the cow at the moment it felt a disturbance
